reference: I went to the local hospital today for my heart. I was having a fluttering sensation in my chest; it felt like my heart was skipping beats, so I thought I should go to the hospital. They checked me out and said everything was fine. I am wearing a twenty-four-hour heart monitor. What would cause this?
text: I went to the local hospital today for my heart. I was having a fluttering sensation in my chest; it felt like my heart was skipping beats. So I thought I should go to the hospital. They checked me out and said everything was fine. I am wearing a twenty-four-hour heart monitor. What would cause this?
